_comment: REFERENCE SHAPE (rc.12 · WS2) — a platform-activation observation. attestation.signature is an ADOPT placeholder; a real record is produced by `loom activate --platform github` querying the live platform and signed by your observer's registered ed25519 key (an identity OUTSIDE the coding agent's write authority). observed_at / tested_at must be fresh. See README.md.

bypass_test.attempted: direct push to main by a builder identity
